title: The Midway (San Francisco, CA): Hours, Address - Tripadvisor
content: Small Group Yosemite and Giant Sequoias Day Trip from San Francisco. (2,234). Duration: 14h. Free cancellation. from. $239.

title: The Midway - Live music venue in Central Waterfront, San Francisco
content: Conclusion: The indoor venue is ideal for small and mid size events, but it is a terrible, terrible, TERRIBLE experience for events with hundreds of people.
